Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.eventbExtensionTests

Class AbstractManualRewriterTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.reasonerExtensionTests.AbstractReasonerTests
org.eventb.core.seqprover.eventbExtensionTests.AbstractManualReasonerTests
org.eventb.core.seqprover.eventbExtensionTests.AbstractManualRewriterTests
Direct Known Subclasses:
AndOrDistTests, CompImgTests, CompUnionDistTests, ConverseTests, DisjToImplTests, DomCompTests, DomDistLeftTests, DomDistRightTests, DomRanUnionDistTests, EqualFunImgDefTests, EquivalentTests, FiniteDefTests, ImpAndTests, ImpOrTests, InclusionSetMinusLeftTests, InclusionSetMinusRightTests, PartitionTests, RanCompTests, RanDistLeftTests, RanDistRightTests, RelImgUnionLeftTests, RelImgUnionRightTests, RelOvrTests, RemoveInclusionTests, RemoveInclusionUniversalTests, RemoveMembershipTests, RemoveNegationTests, SetEqualityTests, SetMinusTests, StrictInclusionTests, UnionInterDistTests
public abstract class AbstractManualRewriterTests extends AbstractManualReasonerTests
Abstract unit tests for the Manual Rewrites reasoners that implement the AbstractManualRewrites interface. The purpose of this class is to simplify the testing of such reasoners.

Implementers should define at least:

  • One method to test the function published in the reasoner tactic that allows to compute applicable positions using method {@link #assertGetPositions(String, String...).</li>
  • One method to test the overall integration of the reasoner in the AbstractManualRewrites class. It should test both for successful and failing reasoner applications.
  • Then use as many methods as appropriate to verify the rewriting performed by the reasoner independently from the machinery in the abstract class. This should be done using the methods rewritePred(String, String, String,String) and noRewritePred(String, String, String).
